title: NMSA 1-1-5. Voter
text:
1-1-5. Voter. 
As used in the Election Code, "voter" means any qualified elector or federal qualified elector 
who is registered to vote under the provisions of the Election Code.

History: 1953 Comp., § 3-1-5, enacted by Laws 1969, ch. 240, § 5; 2011, ch. 137, § 6; 2015, 
ch. 145, § 4; 2019, ch. 212, § 3.
